texto: She raised a brow as she inspected the blood bag. "I wouldn't exactly call it my favorite. Somewhere along the lines of a V8 is more toward my favorite." Chloë grunted in protest. "So my file didn't mention my fondness for cheeseburgers? Because that's a big miss from The Bureau. Makes me kinda question the accuracy of my dossier." - From Tall, Dark & Deadly
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kharma Kelley que provoca temas ligados a amor. Ao questionar “She raised a brow as she inspected the blood bag. "I wouldn't exactly call it my favorite. Somewh…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, blood, humor, com foco em reflexao-noturna e humor.
